content.problemStatement:
I'ma need space, I'ma, I'ma need 

You know I'm a star; space, I'ma need space 

I'ma need space, I'ma, I'ma need space (N-A-S-A)

Given an array AAA of size NNN.

Find total number of pairs in the array (i,j)(i, j)(i,j) (1â‰¤iâ‰¤jâ‰¤N)(1\le i\le j \le N)(1â‰¤iâ‰¤jâ‰¤N) such that:


AiâŠ•AjA_i \oplus  A_jAiâ€‹âŠ•Ajâ€‹ is a palindrome (in **decimal** representation), where âŠ•\oplusâŠ• denotes the bitwise xor operator.

Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of multiple lines of input.

The first line of each test case contains one integer NNN - the size of the array.
The next line contains NNN space-seperated integers as array elements.




Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line, the number of pairs satisfying the given condition.
constraints: The sum of N over all test cases does not exceed 2â‹…1052\cdot 10^{5}2â‹…105.
